meaning: adj.惊悸的,带有恐怖感的,惊骇的
examples: We were horrified at the conditions prevailing in local prisons.
His family was horrified by the change.
She gazed at him in horrified disbelief.
Suddenly the surgeon was the patient, and Kenagy was horrified by what he saw.
While many people are awed by what we're doing, plenty of others are more than a little horrified.
